product.name: Dealmed 6" Cotton-Tipped Wood Applicators – 200 Sterile Cotton-Tipped Applicators for Application of Medication, Cleaning Skin, Arts, Crafts and More (Box of 200)
features: Dealmed 6" Cotton-Tipped Wood Applicators – 200 Sterile Cotton-Tipped Applicators, Ideal for Application of Medication, Cleaning Skin, Arts and Crafts and More (Box of 200)
Convenient Design: Ensure precision in application without any irritation along with firm wooden shafts to improve accuracy and dexterity.
Multi-Purpose Use: These soft tip applicators are ideal for the application of medication, cleaning skin, at home use, arts & crafts and more.
Individual Pouches: For easy use and convenience, each box is broken up into 100 pouches, with 2 soft cotton tipped applicators per pouch.
2,000 Applicators: Each sterile box contains a generous 200 cotton-tipped applicators for long lasting use.
